description: With a sporty look and stylish design, this leather loafer from skechers makes for a perfect addition to your casual wardrobe. Upper Leather upper with perforations on the forefoot for absolute breathable comfort Slip-on style for ease of wear Striped elastic gores on the sides for style Padded footbed for all-day comfort Midsole EVA midsole for impact protection Outsole Durable rubber outsole with grooves on the periphery of the lateral forefoot and heel for absolute grip and traction shoe care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner if needed Do not store in direct sunlight
